name: storystore
description: Intent-story documentation with audits, guarded edits, and impact checks

interface.shortDescription: Durable user intent for software repos
interface.longDescription: Storystore maintains long-lived, prose-first intent stories under docs/stories/. Each story describes a user-facing capability of the software, written for humans first and agents second. The plugin ships authoring, audit, coverage, guarded-edit, and impact-check skills so agents treat code and tests as evidence rather than automatic authority to rewrite accepted intent.
defaultPrompt: Initialize intent stories for this repository under docs/stories/.
Run a stories-coverage report and tell me which user-facing surfaces lack story coverage.
